payload.label: bed
payload.long_description: Foreground bed with a beige-gray striped duvet and visible mattress edge on a dark stained wooden frame; headboard and pillows are partially visible at the left, the right and top edges of the bed are cropped by the image, and a bedside table with a lamp and a window with blinds are visible behind it — approximate camera distance ~1.0 m.
